items.title: NEW: The US Army placed its first new order for PAC-2 GEM-T Patriot missiles in over 30 years.  PAC-2s are older and less capable than PAC-3s, but stockpiles are so depleted (the U…
items.summary_raw: NEW: The US Army placed its first new order for PAC-2 GEM-T Patriot missiles in over 30 years.  PAC-2s are older and less capable than PAC-3s, but stockpiles are so depleted (the US fired an estimated 1,060–1,430 Patriots against Iran) that the Army needs everything it can get.  Global demand from Ukraine, Israel, and the Gulf is straining supply, and deliveries take years.  Trump is seeking $67.1B in supplemental funding to replenish munitions.

items.summary_raw: ⚡️ In the name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful  Press Release The Islamic Resistance Movement (Hamas) mourns, to the masses of our Palestinian people and the free people of the world, the revolutionary Japanese fighter "Kozo Okamoto," who passed away today in the Lebanese capital, Beirut, after a life full of sacrifice and giving. The journey of the late "Kozo Okamoto," from resisting occupation to steadfastness in its prisons, embodied human principles and values, and sincere and diligent work to support the Palestinian cause and the rights of the Palestinian people. As we bid farewell today to the revolutionary "Kozo Okamoto," we extend our sincere condolences and sympathy to his family, relatives, and comrades in the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine, affirming that he will remain a symbol of freedom and a symbol of resistance against the forces of oppression and tyranny, and of global solidarity with our Palestinian people and their just cause.  Islamic Resistance Movement – Hamas Thursday: July 23, 2026 AD Corresponding to: Safar 09, 1448 AH

items.title: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee:  So here's the way I look at it. It is the Jewish people upon which Christianity is built. It is the Judeo-Christian foundation upon which …
items.summary_raw: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee:  So here's the way I look at it. It is the Jewish people upon which Christianity is built. It is the Judeo-Christian foundation upon which Western civilization was built.  If there was no Western civilization, the idea of the sanctity of the individual—where did that come from? From the God of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob.  Where did that get into motion in government? Was it from ancient Rome? No. Was it from ancient Greece? No. Was it from the Ottoman Empire? No.  If there had not been an Israel, there would never have been an America.

items.title: Chaotic Progress: European NATO’s Quest for Stronger Defense
items.summary_raw:
In 2024, Max Bergmann wrote, “NATO Missed a Chance to Transform Itself,” where he argued NATO’s leadership needs to facilitate a strong European pillar of the alliance through structural reforms in European institutions. Two years later, we asked Max to revisit his arguments.Image: The White House via Wikimedia CommonsIn 2024, you argued NATO’s own leadership should facilitate a European pillar. Two years later, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte told the European Parliament that anyone who thinks Europe can defend itself without the United States is dreaming, drawing public pushback from European leaders. Does that rift suggest NATO’s leadership is blocking progress on

items.title: Thousands evacuated in south of France as wildfire rages across pine forest – video
items.summary_raw:
Local people and tourists were evacuated from the Arcachon Bay area overnight into Thursday after a huge fire engulfed more than 3,400 hectares (8,400 acres) of forest. Pushed by the wind, with flames reaching 10 metres high, the fire is still spreading towards the Cap Ferret peninsula. On Tuesday, two firefighters died battling another nearby fire close to Bordeaux airport

items.title: IAEA says its awaiting US-Saudi request on nuclear deal verification
items.summary_raw:
IAEA says its awaiting US-Saudi request on nuclear deal verification

The UN nuclear watchdog is aware of a US-Saudi plan to ask it to carry out verification work in relation to the nuclear cooperation deal they are discussing, but has yet to receive a request from them, it said on Thursday.

"We look forward to receiving the request for such verification and to working with the U.S. and KSA (Kingdom of Saudi Arabia) in ensuring the implementation of those measures," the International Atomic Energy Agency said in a statement.

items.title: Λύση στον ακραίο καύσωνα δίνει η Ιαπωνία: Κυκλοφόρησαν τα πρώτα «ψυγεία» για ανθρώπους – Πώς λειτουργούν
items.summary_raw:

items.title: Trump Says Saudi Nuclear Pact Requires Kingdom to Normalize Israel Relations Through Abraham Accords
items.summary_raw:
WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Thursday said an agreement being reached with Saudi Arabia for a civilian nuclear program requires the kingdom to normalize relations with Israel through the Abraham Accords. In a post on social media, the Republican president said the deal doesn’t allow for enrichment of uranium. Nonproliferation experts have raised concerns that the deal fails to include guardrails to prevent enrichment of uranium to weapons-grade levels. Trump's post said the agreement “will be approved, but is totally subject to Saudi Arabia joining the very respected and successful Abraham Accords.” He added that “The United States is not opposed to Civil (Non-Enriched) Nuclear Facilities.”

The post Trump Says Saudi Nuclear Pact Requires Kingdom to Normalize Israel Relations Through Abraham Accords appeared first on The National Herald.

Ο Υπουργός Εθνικής Άμυνας, Νίκος Δένδιας, συμμετείχε σήμερα, Πέμπτη 23 Ιουλίου 2026, στη συνεδρίαση του Κυβερνητικού Συμβουλίου Εθνικής Ασφάλειας (ΚΥΣΕΑ), υπό τον Πρωθυπουργό, Κυριάκο Μητσοτάκη, στο Μέγαρο Μαξίμου. items.title: Πρώτο φυσικό αέριο από το «Αφροδίτη» έως το 2031
items.summary_raw:
Βάσει προγράμματος προχωρούν τα χρονοδιαγράμματα του ενεργειακού σχεδιασμού της Κυπριακής Δημοκρατίας, δήλωσε ο υπουργός Ενέργειας, Μιχάλης Δαμιανός. Σύμφωνα με τον υπουργό, η παραγωγή του πρώτου φυσικού αερίου από το κοίτασμα «Αφροδίτη» αναμένεται έως το τέλος του 2030 ή εντός του 2031. items.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
items.summary_raw:
Exclusive: Analysis of NHS England data reveals stark impact of air pollution in deprived areas

Children living in the poorest areas across England are 40% more likely to be admitted to hospital for respiratory infections, an analysis of NHS England data shows, with experts raising the alarm on the impact of air pollution on young people’s health.

The analysis, based on data obtained via freedom of information requests by the charity Impact on Urban Health, revealed 1,941 out of every 100,000 children living in the most deprived fifth of England were admitted to hospital for respiratory illnesses in 2024-25.

items.title: Trump Links Saudi Nuclear Deal to Accords
items.summary_raw:
BREAKING 

Trump: The U.S. will approve a civilian nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia, but only if Riyadh joins the Abraham Accords.

Trump said the deal would allow only non military nuclear energy with no uranium enrichment, adding that the U.S. supports peaceful nuclear programs under those conditions.
items.summary_el: Ο Τραμπ ανακοίνωσε ότι οι ΗΠΑ θα εγκρίνουν πολιτική πυρηνική συμφωνία με τη Σαουδική Αραβία μόνο εάν η Riyadh ενταχθεί στο Abraham Accords, με την ενέργεια να περιορίζεται σε μη στρατιωτική χρήση.

items.title: More than 20,000 evacuated after intense wildfire in France
items.summary_raw:
Reception centres open to thousands of evacuees after blaze begins in pine forest 45km west of Bordeaux

  • Europe live – latest updates

More than 20,000 people, including thousands of tourists from campsites and other holiday accommodation, have been evacuated as a “particularly intense” wildfire advances on the Atlantic coast of south-west France, authorities have said.

The blaze, which began in dense pine forest near the village of Saumos about 40km (25 miles) west of Bordeaux and just north of the bay of Arcachon, a popular tourist destination, had burned 2,400 hectares (5,928 acres) in less than 24 hours, firefighters said on Thursday.

Continue reading...

items.title: The EU has approved its 21st sanctions package against Russia after Greece agreed to lift its veto in exchange for an exemption allowing Greek companies to continue transporting Ru…
items.summary_raw: The EU has approved its 21st sanctions package against Russia after Greece agreed to lift its veto in exchange for an exemption allowing Greek companies to continue transporting Russian LNG to non-EU customers under pre-2022 contracts.   The package keeps the Russian oil price cap at $44 per barrel for another year and expands sanctions to include more shadow fleet vessels, Russian banks, crypto and oil-trading platforms, metals, and over 250 individuals and companies.  Several proposed measures were watered down during negotiations, including dropping restrictions on Russian fish imports, removing Patriarch Kirill and Lukoil founder Vagit Alekperov from the sanctions list, and scaling back a proposed Schengen entry ban for Russian soldiers.

items.title: Japan's planned participation in a USD 40bn US small modular reactor (SMR) project has stalled because Tokyo wants legal assurance that its lenders won't be liable if a nuclear acc…
items.summary_raw: Japan's planned participation in a USD 40bn US small modular reactor (SMR) project has stalled because Tokyo wants legal assurance that its lenders won't be liable if a nuclear accident occurs.  The project, agreed as part of Japan's USD 550bn US investment pledge tied to lower US tariffs, would fund SMRs in Tennessee and Alabama.  US officials have verbally assured Japan that state-backed lenders such as JBIC would bear no liability, arguing the reactors will be US government-owned and operated.   However, Japan wants those assurances in writing before committing funds.  Source: FT

items.title: Η Elbit Systems φέρνει δυνατότητες επίγνωσης κατάστασης «τύπου F-35» σε F-16, F-15 και Eurofighter
items.summary_raw:
Η ισραηλινή Elbit Systems παρουσίασε στη Διεθνή Αεροπορική Έκθεση του Farnborough ένα νέο σύστημα ηλεκτροοπτικής επίγνωσης τακτικής κατάστασης, το οποίο υπόσχεται να προσφέρει σε μαχητικά προηγούμενης γενιάς, όπως τα F-16, F-15 και Eurofighter Typhoon, δυνατότητες αντίστοιχες με εκείνες του F-35 Lightning II. Το νέο σύστημα, με την ονομασία EO DAS (Electro–Optical Distributed Aperture System), αποτελείται […]

Το άρθρο Η Elbit Systems φέρνει δυνατότητες επίγνωσης κατάστασης «τύπου F-35» σε F-16, F-15 και Eurofighter εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο ΠΤΗΣΗ.

items.title: Besieged by lobbyists, will UK ministers protect our ecosystems? No, they’ll chicken out | George Monbiot
items.summary_raw:
Industrial poultry farming is killing our rivers. But rather than stop it, the government has been facilitating it. Will Andy Burnham end this ecocide?

There’s a slightly mean question I often ask British people with an interest in the living world: can you name the environment secretary? I don’t intend to show them up: it’s not them I’m testing. I watch the brows knit, a finger go up, the mouth open and close. “It’s, you know, the one who … no, they went, didn’t they? That other one …” It’s been like this for seven years.

Why? Because throughout this period, we’ve not had environment secretaries. We’ve had portals through which corporate lobbyists may pass. The last incumbent to represent the wider public interest (and I can scarcely bring myself to type these words) was Michael Gove. In his other roles, he’s widely remembered with loathing and disgust. Out of office, he continues to poison public life, as editor of the Spectator. But in this role, to general astonishment, he placed the public good above special interests.

George Monbiot

Η Βρετανία ανακοίνωσε την προσωρινή απομάκρυνση των εναπομεινάντων μελών του διπλωματικού προσωπικού της από το Ιράν, επικαλούμενη την επιδείνωση της κατάστασης ασφαλείας στην περιοχή. Η απόφαση ελήφθη ενώ οι αμερικανικές ένοπλες δυνάμεις εξαπέλυσαν βομβαρδισμούς εναντίον της Ισλαμικής Δημοκρατίας για 12η συνεχόμενη νύχτα. «Λόγω της συνεχιζόμενης κατάστασης ασφαλείας, λάβαμε το προληπτικό μέτρο της προσωρινής απομάκρυνσης του ... Περισσότερα

www.ertnews.gr
items.summary_el: Η Βρετανία αποσύρει προσωρινά το διπλωματικό της προσωπικό από το Ιράν λόγω επιδείνωσης της ασφάλειας, καθώς οι ΗΠΑ διεξάγουν βομβαρδισμούς για 12η συνεχόμενη νύχτα.

items.title: IRGC claims several attacks on US army facilities in Kuwait
items.summary_raw:
IRGC claims several attacks on US army facilities in Kuwait

The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) announced attacks targeting US military infrastructure in Kuwait. 

In a statement, the IRGC said it targeted a large warehouse of military equipment, a Patriot missile defense system, and a hangar of American MQ9 drones at the Ali al-Salem Air Base. 

It also carried out strikes on two helicopter hangars in Camp al-Adiri as well as targeted a telecommunications tower in the Gulf country.
items.summary_el: Τα Ιράν εκ Φρουρών της Επανάστασης (IRGC) ανακοίνωσαν επιθέσεις κατά αμερικανικών στρατιωτικών εγκαταστάσεων στο Κουβέιτ, συμπεριλαμβανομένης της αεροπορικής βάσης Ali al-Salem, με στόχο αποθήκες εξοπλισμού, συστήματα Patriot και drone MQ9.

Η θέση αυτή διατυπώνεται σε επιστολή του Γραφείου Νομοθετικών Υποθέσεων του Στέιτ Ντιπάρτμεντ προς τον […]

items.title: Chairman: ABC's Trump Speech Snub Part of FCC License Review
items.summary_raw:
FCC Chairman Brendan Carr said Wednesday that ABC's decision not to air President Donald Trump's July 16 election security speech live will factor into the agency's ongoing review of the network's station licenses.

The post Chairman: ABC’s Trump Speech Snub Part of FCC License Review appeared first on Breitbart.
items.summary_el: Ο πρόεδρος της Ομοσπονδιακής Επιτροπής Τηλεπικοινωνιών (FCC) Μπρέντναν Κάρ δήλωσε ότι η απόφαση του ABC να μην προβάλει ζωντανά την ομιλία του προέδρου Τραμπ για την εκλογική ασφάλεια της 16ης Ιουλίου θα λαμβάνεται υπόψη στην τρέχουσα επιθεώρηση των αδειών του δικτύου.

items.title: Israel's spy chief held talks on Iran war in Washington, Axios reports
items.summary_raw:
Israel's spy chief held talks on Iran war in Washington, Axios reports

The head of Israel's Mossad intelligence agency travelled to Washington two weeks ago to discuss the Iran war, in his first visit to the US capital since taking office, Axios reported on Wednesday, citing two unidentified sources with knowledge of the situation. 

He met with CIA director John Ratcliffe and White House officials, the report said.

items.summary_el: O αρχηγός του Mossad Roman Gofman συναντήθηκε με τον διευθυντή της CIA John Ratcliffe και αξιωματούχους του Λευκού Οίκου για συντονισμό της πολιτικής απέναντι στο Ιράν και το πυρηνικό του πρόγραμμα.

items.title: ΗΠΑ και Σαουδική Αραβία προ των πυλών μιας ιστορικής συμφωνίας για την πυρηνική ενέργεια
items.summary_raw:
Οι Ηνωμένες Πολιτείες και η Σαουδική Αραβία βρίσκονται ένα βήμα πριν από την ολοκλήρωση μιας στρατηγικής συμφωνίας πολιτικής πυρηνικής συνεργασίας, γνωστής ως «123 Agreement», βάσει της  αμερικανικής νομοθεσίας Atomic Energy Act. Η συμφωνία, η οποία έχει ήδη εγκριθεί από τον πρόεδρο των ΗΠΑ Ντόναλντ Τραμπ και αναμένεται να ανακοινωθεί επίσημα το προσεχές διάστημα πριν υποβληθεί […]

Το άρθρο ΗΠΑ και Σαουδική Αραβία προ των πυλών μιας ιστορικής συμφωνίας για την πυρηνική ενέργεια εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο ΠΤΗΣΗ.

items.title: France recorded more than 5,700 excess deaths during June heatwave
items.summary_raw:
Figures come as large parts of southern Europe endure another record-breaking period of extreme temperatures

France recorded more than 5,700 excess deaths during its June heatwave, authorities have said, as swathes of southern Europe continue to endure another record-breaking period of extreme temperatures.

The French national health agency said on Wednesday that it had recorded 5,764 excess deaths ⁠between ​17 June and 2 July, an excess mortality rate of 36%.

items.title: Theodorikakos: Aegean Technical Base and Flight Simulator Centre a Landmark Investment
items.summary_raw:
ATHENS - Development Minister Takis Theodorikakos visited Aegean's Technical Base and Flight Simulator and Crew Training Centre at Athens International Airport (AIA). Aegean Chairman Eftychios Vassilakis welcomed Theodorikakos and gave him a tour, according to a press release. The minister toured the state-of-the-art aircraft maintenance, repair and technical inspection facilities, as well as the crew training areas. The investment has been included in the Flagship Investments of Exceptional Importance programme, with a budget of more than 66 million euros and total funding of 13 million euros from the Ministry of Development.

The post Theodorikakos: Aegean Technical Base and Flight Simulator Centre a Landmark Investment appeared first on The National Herald.

items.title: Wikipedia Releases Promotional Videos Denying Leftist Bias, Promoting Use by Students for Homework
items.summary_raw:
The Wikimedia Foundation that owns Wikipedia this month released three promotional videos in its “A Wiki Minute” series, which provide one-minute elaborations on topics related to the site. One video bluntly rejects political bias claims and asserts Wikipedia presents neutral and reliable information, despite numerous controversies, particularly regarding its left-wing bias. Another video supports the site being used by students for schoolwork, while the last defends its reliability over AI, which often relies on Wikipedia as a source of training data.

The post Wikipedia Releases Promotional Videos Denying Leftist Bias, Promoting Use by Students for Homework appeared first on Breitbart.

items.title: Πρωθυπουργός της Πορτογαλίας σε Μητσοτάκη: Ελλάδα και Πορτογαλία είναι παράδειγμα σταθερότητας – Τα μηνύματα για Οικονομία, Frontex και ΕΕ
items.summary_raw:
Ο πρωθυπουργός της Πορτογαλίας Λούις Μοντενέγκρο στις κοινές δηλώσεις με τον Έλληνα πρωθυπουργό Κυριάκο Μητσοτάκη, που έγιναν αμέσως μετά τη συνάντησή τους στο Μέγαρο Μαξίμου, ανέφερε ότι υπάρχουν κοινά σημεία ανάμεσα στις δύο κυβερνήσεις. Ο κ. Μοντενέγκρο μίλησε μεταξύ άλλων για την συμμετοχή των δύο χωρών στο συμβούλιο ασφαλείας του ΟΗΕ και συνεχάρη την ελληνική […]

Το άρθρο Πρωθυπουργός της Πορτογαλίας σε Μητσοτάκη: Ελλάδα και Πορτογαλία είναι παράδειγμα σταθερότητας – Τα μηνύματα για Οικονομία, Frontex και ΕΕ εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο ΠΤΗΣΗ.
items.summary_el: Ο πορτογάλος πρωθυπουργός Λούις Μοντενέγκρο επισκέφθηκε το Μέγαρο Μαξίμου και χαρακτήρισε Ελλάδα-Πορτογαλία ως παράδειγμα σταθερότητας, με συζήτηση για οικονομία, Frontex και ευρωπαϊκές θέσεις.

items.title: Iran says 'no nuclear activity' at Kolang Kouh
items.summary_raw:
Iran says 'no nuclear activity' at Kolang Kouh

Despite US and Israeli claims, Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei has denied the presence of any nuclear activity at Kolang Koukh, alos known as Pickaxe Mountain.

"Iran’s nuclear activities have been fully declared to the IAEA in accordance with its safeguards obligations. Washington’s obsessive focus on Kolang Kouh where no nuclear activity is taking place is nothing more than a fabricated pretext for aggression, destruction, and sabotage," Baghaei said in a post on X.

The repeated U.S. attacks and threats against Iran’s peaceful nuclear facilities not only constitute a flagrant violation of the core principles of the UN Charter, international law, and the relevant resolutions of the IAEA Board of Governor

items.title: Greece is expected to approve a €3 billion Israeli air defense package as the core of its new "Achilles' Shield" integrated defense network.   The system will combine Barak MX, Dav…
items.summary_raw: Greece is expected to approve a €3 billion Israeli air defense package as the core of its new "Achilles' Shield" integrated defense network.   The system will combine Barak MX, David's Sling, and SPYDER air defense systems with Greece's F-35s, F-16 Vipers, Belharra frigates, and Patriot batteries into a single command network capable of countering aircraft, ballistic missiles, drones, and cruise missiles, marking one of Greece's largest military modernization efforts in decades.  Source: GreekReporter

items.title: Νάξος: 35 μετανάστες εντοπίστηκαν σε παραθαλάσσια περιοχή του νησιού
items.summary_raw:
Τις πρωινές ώρες της Τρίτης 21/07, το Α.Τ. Νάξου ενημέρωσε την Λιμενική Αρχή του νησιού, για τον εντοπισμό μεταναστών στην περιοχή «Άγιος Σώζων», νότια της Νάξου. Στο σημείο μετέβησαν στελέχη του Λιμενικού Σώματος όπου εντόπισαν 35 αλλοδαπούς (5 άνδρες, 11 γυναίκες και 19 ανηλίκους), και στη συνέχεια τους οδήγησαν σε χώρο προσωρινής φιλοξενίας της Νάξου. ... Περισσότερα

www.ertnews.gr

items.title: The world is on fire, and who does Trump blame? The Canadians | Arwa Mahdawi
items.summary_raw:
The US president has been complaining about Canada’s ‘filthy, polluted and unhealthy air’. Maybe he should put all that energy into tackling the climate crisis

Right, that’s it: we’ve got to do something about Canada. The country’s wildfires, which resulted in air quality alerts across more than 20 US states, ruined my weekend. On Friday the air in Philadelphia, where I live, was so unhealthy I couldn’t go outside without my eyes stinging. My kid’s preschool cancelled outdoor time, while the city suspended trash pickup and closed public pools.

You know who did not suspend their regularly scheduled programming because of a bit of toxic smoke? The plot monitoring committee at my allotment. Despite the apocalyptic conditions, they were still busy ensuring the gardening bylaws were strictly adhered to. I realised this on Saturday when I got an official violation for too many weeds. Yes, I’d got a bit carried away with “chaos gardening” (

items.summary_raw:
Ο γενικός διευθυντής της TUSAŞ, Μεχμέτ Ντεμιρόγλου, επιβεβαίωσε στο Farnborought International Airshow ότι οι ΗΠΑ χορήγησαν άδεια εξαγωγής  για 80 κινητήρες F110 προκειμένου να αξιοποιηθούν στις εκδόσεις παραγωγής του τουρκικού μαχητικού KAAN. items.title: Μαλακάσα: Πήγε να κάνει αίτηση ασύλου με τα παιδιά της και κάλεσαν την αστυνομία για να τους συλλάβουν
items.summary_raw: Ήθελε να κάνει ψηφιακά αίτηση για άσυλο, αλλά η πλατφόρμα ήταν εκτός, πήγε με τα δύο μικρά παιδιά της στη δομή Μαλακάσας, αλλά της απαγορεύτηκε η είσοδος και όχι μόνο δεν έγινε δεκτή η καταγραφή του αιτήματος, αλλά οι υπεύθυνοι κάλεσαν την αστυνομία για να τους συλλάβουν. Κρατήθηκαν σε αστυνομικό τμήμα σε απάνθρωπες συνθήκες και παραπέμφθηκαν να δικαστούν για παράνομη παραμονή, με βάση τον νόμο Πλεύρη .Επειδή δεν έγιναν δεκτοί να καταθέσουν αίτημα ασύλου, βγήκε σε βάρος τους απόφαση απέλασης και μεταφέρθηκαν στο κέντρο κράτησης της Αμυγδαλέζας.
items.summary_el: Μητέρα με δύο μικρά παιδιά κρατήθηκε στη Μαλακάσα αφού επιχείρησε να καταθέσει αίτηση ασύλου και αντί να γίνει δεκτή, η δομή κάλεσε την αστυνομία για σύλληψη.
items.angle: Όταν το σύστημα ασύλου τιμωρεί αντί να προστατεύει – η υπόθεση που ρίχνει φως στις πολιτικές της κυβέρνησης

items.title: President Trump approved a 30-year civilian nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia worth tens of billions of dollars, giving U.S. companies a leading role in building the kingdom's nu…
items.summary_raw: President Trump approved a 30-year civilian nuclear agreement with Saudi Arabia worth tens of billions of dollars, giving U.S. companies a leading role in building the kingdom's nuclear infrastructure.  A key feature is the potential construction of a U.S.-built uranium enrichment facility in Saudi Arabia if a joint study finds it commercially justified.   The Trump administration says U.S. oversight and a "black box" system would prevent sensitive technology transfer and reduce the risk of military use.  Unlike the Biden administration, Trump did not require Saudi Arabia to normalize relations with Israel before approving the deal.   The agreement is expected to be signed this week and sent to Congress, where opponents face a difficult path to blocking it.  Source: WSJ

items.title: Γιατί η Ολγκίν σπεύδει στην Άγκυρα να δει τον Φιντάν πριν την επίσκεψη Γκουτέρες
items.summary_raw:
Η προσωπική απεσταλμένη του Γκουτέρες, Μαρία Άνχελα Ολγκίν, ταξιδεύει στην Άγκυρα για να πείσει τον Χακάν Φιντάν πριν την επίσκεψη του ΓΓ ΟΗΕ στην Κύπρο, καθώς η Τουρκία παραμένει προσηλωμένη στη «λύση δύο κρατών».

Το άρθρο Γιατί η Ολγκίν σπεύδει στην Άγκυρα να δει τον Φιντάν πριν την επίσκεψη Γκουτέρες εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο Philenews.

items.title: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇦🇷🇺 BIG | Kyiv's air power modernization has crossed a historic threshold, confirming the first-ever direct air-to-air kill by a Ukrainian F-16 against a frontline Ru…
items.summary_raw: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇦🇷🇺 BIG | Kyiv's air power modernization has crossed a historic threshold, confirming the first-ever direct air-to-air kill by a Ukrainian F-16 against a frontline Russian fighter.  Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine officially verified that a Ukrainian-piloted F-16 Fighting Falcon shot down a Russian Su-35 Flanker-E in aerial combat. The engagement marks a milestone for Ukraine’s air force, representing the first combat-confirmed air-to-air victory achieved by western-supplied fighters since their deployment to the theatre.  This air-to-air kill shatters the operational dominance Russian air assets previously enjoyed over contested frontline airspace. By successfully locking onto and destroying Moscow's premier multirole fighter—a machine long touted for its maneuverability and advanced radar suite—Ukrainian pilots have proven that modern Western tactics, combined with advanced Beyond-Visual-Range (BVR) missile integration, can systematically neutralize Russia's high-end tactical aviation and reshape the battle for air superiority.  See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

items.summary_raw: ⚡️ ⏺Ukraine seeks to localize Western weapons production; agreement with BAE Systems for L119 howitzer production ⏺Ukraine has reached an agreement with the British defense company BAE Systems to begin licensed production of the L119 light howitzer within the country. This project will start with the construction of a prototype and, if successful, could pave the way for the production of other advanced Western systems in Ukraine, including Patriot and Aster air defense missiles. ⏺According to the report, this move is part of Kyiv's strategy to reduce reliance on arms imports and develop the capabilities of its domestic defense industry. Despite Ukraine's progress in drones and electronic warfare, the country remains dependent on Western knowledge and technology for the production of complex systems such as missiles, radars, and satellite technologies. ⏺Experts believe that establishing the L119 howitzer production line will be an important test of Ukraine's industrial capacity to manufacture heavy Western equipment, as the production of these systems requires advanced technologies in metallurgy, precision machining, and industrial integration. items.title: Trump: US will hit rumoured Iranian nuclear site ‘soon’
items.summary_raw:
Trump: US will hit rumoured Iranian nuclear site ‘soon’

Trump told reporters on Tuesday that the US will be hitting the area where Iran’s nuclear centrifuges are rumoured to be “very heavily” in the near future, without clarifying when.

“Probably pretty soon, and there’s not a thing they can do about it,” he said following a meeting with Lebanese President Joseph Aoun in the White House.

Pickaxe Mountain is said to be the site where Iran’s nuclear programme was moved to, located near Iran’s Natanz uranium enrichment facility in the south of Tehran.

The area is heavily fortified and contains two deeply buried tunnel complexes which experts suggest would be very difficult to destroy.

items.title: Ed Miliband, the new UK foreign secretary, on Israel, Iraq, Syria and Iran
items.summary_raw:
Ed Miliband, the new UK foreign secretary, on Israel, Iraq, Syria and Iran

Having initially been tipped for the role of chancellor, former Labour leader Ed Miliband has been appointed foreign secretary by Andy Burnham, the UK's new prime minister.

Accepting the role, Miliband said that it was an “honour and privilege” to take up the position. “My parents came to Britain as Jewish refugees from the Nazis,” he said. 

“To them, Britain was both a sanctuary and a beacon of hope in the global fight against fascism. I will carry my parents' faith in that spirit of Britain to my role representing our country.”

The former energy minister said the world faced greater instability and graver threats to international law and democracy than at any time since the Second World War.

items.title: Trump: Iran ‘desperate to meet’ for talks
items.summary_raw:
Trump: Iran ‘desperate to meet’ for talks

Speaking to reporters in the White House on Tuesday, Trump claimed that the Iranians “want to meet desperately to try and end [the war] because they’re getting decimated”, adding that “until they’re ready to meet in a meaningful way, we have no interest”. 

He said that the US military is “degrading” Iran’s military capabilities “at levels that nobody thought was possible”, but admitted that Iran “did slip something through in Jordan” after an Iranian strike on the country killed two US service members.

Trump also claimed that if the US strikes hadn’t knocked out Iran’s nuclear sites last year, Iran “would have a nuclear weapon, and you wouldn’t have Israel”.
items.summary_el: Ο Τραμπ ισχυρίστηκε ότι το Ιράν επιθυμεί επειγόντως να διαπραγματευθεί για λήξη του συγκρούσης «γιατί υφίσταται καταστροφικές απώλειες», ενώ τόνισε ότι οι ΗΠΑ δεν έχουν ενδιαφέρον για συνομιλίες εφόσον δεν είναι ουσιαστικές.

items.title: Turkey’s opposition leader to form new party to challenge Erdogan

The move, which was expected, poses the latest challenge for the Republican People’s Party’s (CHP), which modern Turkey’s founder Mustafa Kemal […]
items.summary_el: Ο αρχηγός της τουρκικής αντιπολίτευσης Οζγιούρ Οζέλ αποχωρεί από το κύριο αντιπολιτευτικό κόμμα για να συστήσει νέο κόμμα, αντιμέτωπος με την δύο χρόνια διαρκούσα νομική καταδίωξη από τον Ερντογάν.

items.title: Occupied communities back Cyprus talks push
items.summary_raw: The Committee of Occupied Communities of Kyrenia, Nicosia and Famagusta expressed support for President Nikos Christodoulides’ efforts to resume negotiations on the Cyprus issue following a meeting at the presidential palace on Tuesday. Committee chairman Michalis Tzortas said members were briefed by the president on the latest developments on the Cyprus problem, including the forthcoming […]

items.title: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  After many years, relations between Azerbaijan and Armenia are returning to normal.  Today, Armenia receives both diesel fuel and gasoline pro…
items.summary_raw: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  After many years, relations between Azerbaijan and Armenia are returning to normal.  Today, Armenia receives both diesel fuel and gasoline products from Azerbaijan. This is a major contribution to Armenia's energy security.  At the same time, the transit of goods across Azerbaijani territory into Armenia has expanded significantly.  Goods are now transported through Azerbaijani territory to Armenia.  We are living through a historic period.
items.summary_el: Ο πρόεδρος του Αζερμπαϊτζάν Ιλχάμ Αλίγιεφ δήλωσε ότι οι σχέσεις Αζερμπαϊτζάν-Αρμενίας ομαλοποιούνται μετά από χρόνια, με το Αζερμπαϊτζάν να παρέχει καύσιμα στην Αρμενία και να επεκτείνονται σημαντικά οι εμπορικές διαδρομές μέσω του αζερμπαϊτζανικού εδάφους.
items.angle: Η νέα εποχή στο Κοιμητήριο του Καυκάσου: Το Αζερμπαϊτζάν και η Αρμενία επιστρέφουν στο τραπέζι του διαλόγου - τι σημαίνει αυτό για τη σταθερότητα της περιοχής;

items.title: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  Starting this year, Azerbaijani natural gas is being imported into Germany.  Today, Azerbaijani natural gas is supplied to ten European countr…
items.summary_raw: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  Starting this year, Azerbaijani natural gas is being imported into Germany.  Today, Azerbaijani natural gas is supplied to ten European countries, including ten member states of the European Union. This is, of course, a significant contribution to Europe's energy security.  Azerbaijan also exports crude oil to Germany. In the future, so-called green energy will also be exported to Europe.   Therefore, our cooperation in the field of energy security will become even broader.
items.summary_el: Ο πρόεδρος Αλιέφ ανακοινώνει ότι το αζερμπαϊτζανικό φυσικό αέριο φτάνει σε δέκα ευρωπαϊκές χώρες και θα επεκταθεί η παροχή σε πράσινη ενέργεια.

Against the backdrop of the ongoing crisis in the Middle East, cooperation on oil and natural gas supplies via the Southern Gas Corridor is of particular importance.  We want to further diversify our energy supply with Azerbaijan.

items.title: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  Russian energy infrastructure is being destroyed and taken out of operation.   Russia is no longer able to supply all of its traditional partn…
items.summary_raw: Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev:  Russian energy infrastructure is being destroyed and taken out of operation.   Russia is no longer able to supply all of its traditional partners with sufficient gas and oil.  We should not abandon the green agenda, but at the same time European banks should reconsider their decision so that oil and gas infrastructure projects can once again receive investment.  If that happens, Azerbaijan will be able to significantly increase its exports of natural gas and oil to Europe, including Germany.
items.summary_el: Ο πρόεδρος Αζερμπαϊτζάν Ιλχάμ Αλιέφ δηλώνει ότι η ρωσική ενεργειακή υποδομή καταστρέφεται και προσφέρει το Αζερμπαϊτζάν ως εναλλακτική πηγή αερίου και πετρελαίου για την Ευρώπη.

items.title: Σύμφωνο μετανάστευσης: Ένα κούφιο success story
items.summary_raw: Η Κομισιόν αξιολογεί ως απόλυτα επιτυχημένο το πρώτο διάστημα εφαρμογής του νέου Ευρωπαϊκού Συμφώνου για το άσυλο, αν και η πραγματικότητα είναι εντελώς διαφορετική. Οργανώσεις και άνθρωποι από το πεδίο επισημαίνουν ότι στην πράξη παρέλυσε η διαδικασία ασύλου για τις νέες αφίξεις.
items.summary_el: Η Ευρωπαϊκή Επιτροπή προβάλλει ως επιτυχία το νέο Σύμφωνο Μετανάστευσης-Ασύλου, ωστόσο οργανώσεις και εργαζόμενοι στο πεδίο καταγγέλλουν ότι στην πράξη έχει παραλύσει η διαδικασία ασύλου για τις νέες αφίξεις μεταναστών.

items.title: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇲🇮🇷 The nuclear standoff with Iran has shifted underground into heavily fortified mountain fortresses, placing Washington and Tehran on a direct collision course for …
items.summary_raw: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇲🇮🇷 The nuclear standoff with Iran has shifted underground into heavily fortified mountain fortresses, placing Washington and Tehran on a direct collision course for pre-emptive military action.  Israeli intelligence assessments shared with Washington reveal that Iran systematically relocated thousands of critical uranium-enrichment centrifuges into deep underground tunnels beneath Pickaxe Mountain near Natanz following recent military conflicts. Fearing Tehran is positioning itself for a rapid nuclear breakout from within an un-targetable mountain vault, Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is urging President Donald Trump to authorize immediate kinetic strikes on the facility—a scenario Trump confirmed remains actively on the table.  This development exposes the limits of surface-level airstrikes and signals that the war over Iran’s nuclear capabilities is entering its most dangerous, decapitating phase. By moving vital centrifuge infrastructure into granite-hardened tunnels beyond the reach of standard munitions, Iran is attempting to create an indestructible nuclear deterrent. items.title: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231: ❗️❗️❗️🇺🇸🎯🇮🇷 A major military operation triggers a rapid escalation in the Middle East, drawing global attention to the critical maritime transit routes of…
items.summary_raw: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231: ❗️❗️❗️🇺🇸🎯🇮🇷 A major military operation triggers a rapid escalation in the Middle East, drawing global attention to the critical maritime transit routes of the Strait of Hormuz.  Overnight reports indicate that U.S. Navy fighter jets and Arleigh Burke-class destroyers launched targeted strikes utilizing Tomahawk cruise missiles against Iranian military positions across southern coastal regions. The naval bombardment reportedly focused on key maritime port infrastructure in Chabahar, Konarak, and Bandar Abbas, as well as Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) military installations situated near Qeshm Island.  This significant deployment of force underscores the heightened military tension surrounding vital international waterways, leaving analysts and foreign governments closely monitoring the potential impact on global energy security and regional stability. tweet
items.summary_el: Αναφορές για μαζική στρατιωτική επιχείρηση ΗΠΑ με αεροσκάφη Navy και καταστροφείς κλάσης Arleigh Burke που εκτόξευσαν πυραύλους Tomahawk κατά ιρανικών θέσεων στα λιμάνια Chabahar, Konarak και Bandar Abbas.

items.title: Rebuilding America’s Critical Minerals Base
items.summary_raw:
There’s a clear consensus that America hollowed out its critical minerals base. How to rebuild it is less settled. Alex Grant of Magrathea Metals and Wes Spurlock of Principal Mineral join Jonathan to discuss the processing technology, labor force, and how government can catalyze private capital investment in the sector rather than replace it.Image: U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission via Wikimedia Commons.

The post Rebuilding America’s Critical Minerals Base appeared first on War on the Rocks.

items.title: Climate and rock art advocates take on Woodside’s ‘carbon bomb’ WA gas project in federal court
items.summary_raw:
Albanese government’s approval of North West Shelf gas extension being challenged by the Australian Conservation Foundation and Friends of Australian Rock Art

The Albanese government’s decision to approve one of the world’s largest gas projects in Western Australia is being challenged in the federal court, setting up a significant test of how Australia’s environment law deals with the climate crisis.

The Australian Conservation Foundation (ACF) and Friends of Australian Rock Art (Fara) are this week running concurrent court challenges against the approval of the extension of Woodside’s major North West Shelf gas export project.

Continue reading...

items.title: Not enough water for UK’s datacentre plans, trade body says
items.summary_raw:
Industry says government’s failure to address cooling demands means AI growth plans are ‘fatally flawed’

The UK will not have enough water for future datacentres, the water industry has said in stark criticism of the government’s AI growth plans.

Datacentres rely on large amounts of water to manage the heat generated by densely packed servers. Cooling towers, chillers and humidification systems make direct use of this water, with large volumes also consumed indirectly through high electrical power needs.

Continue reading...

Scientists recorded slower reduction over past 20 years, but study finds this was ‘temporary rather than sustained’

A previously recorded slowdown in Arctic sea ice decline has ended, according to a new study, with the largest year-to-year wintertime reduction ever recorded.

In a study published last summer, researchers found that melting sea ice in the Arctic had slowed down over the past 20 years, with no statistically significant decline in its extent recorded between 2005 and 2024.

A tropical depression was continuing to develop along the US Gulf coast on Monday as Tropical Storm Fausto strengthened off Mexico’s south-west Pacific coast.

The National Hurricane Center (NHC) in Miami said that the depression was expected to become a tropical storm later on Monday, prompting new watches for portions of the Gulf region.

items.title: Unrwa official warns agency facing financial crisis, calls for international support
items.summary_raw:
Unrwa official warns agency facing financial crisis, calls for international support

The director of the UN agency supporting Palestinian refugees in the occupied West Bank, Roland Friedrich, said that Unrwa continues to face growing humanitarian, social and economic challenges while resources available to meet those needs are shrinking. 

Friedrich stressed that sustained international support is essential to ensure the continuity of basic services and help to preserve regional stability. 

He said that Unrwa is currently facing a financial shortfall of over $100m in 2026, warning that the funding gap threatens its essential services for millions of Palestinian refugees while the situation in Gaza and the occupied West Bank is increasingly dire.

items.title: Summary of Russia's missile and drone attacks on Ukraine over the last week (July 13-19, 2026):  The following was launched:  ~ 44 Kh-59/69 cruise missiles ~ 42 Iskander-M ballisti…
items.summary_raw: Summary of Russia's missile and drone attacks on Ukraine over the last week (July 13-19, 2026):  The following was launched:  ~ 44 Kh-59/69 cruise missiles ~ 42 Iskander-M ballistic missiles ~ 16 modified S-400 ballistic missiles ~ 7 Kh-31P anti-radar missiles ~ 6 Zircon hypersonic cruise missiles ~ 5 Oniks supersonic cruise missiles ~ 4 Kh-22/32 cruise missiles ~ 822+ drones (Geran-2/3/4/5, Italmas, Gerbera, Banderol).  That's a total of ~123 missiles, of which a *minimum* of 15 were shot down (8 S-400s, 5 Kh-59/69s, 2 Iskander-Ms).   Note: the drone count does not include FPV drones such as Molniya-1.   Missile strikes were carried out on Odesa, Mykolaiv, Kherson, Kharkiv, Sumy, and Kyiv Oblasts, while drone strikes were carried out on Odesa, Mykolaiv, Zaporizhzhia, Dnipropetrovsk, Donetsk, Kharkiv, Sumy, Poltava, Chernihiv, Kyiv, Vinnytsia, and Zhytomyr Oblasts.   Note: The locations shown on the map are approximate. One dot does not necessarily represent only one strike.

According to breaking reports from Reuters, the targeted vessel was navigating the critical international shipping lane when the strike occurred, igniting a serious onboard fire and triggering immediate emergency responses. While the exact source of the projectile has not been formally confirmed, the attack bears all the hallmarks of the ongoing aggressive campaign by Iranian forces and their regional proxies to completely paralyze global maritime trade and choke off international shipping corridors.  This brazen assault on international shipping represents a direct, intolerable provocation against global commerce and Western economic interests. By converting one of the world's most vital maritime choke points into an active combat zone, hostile actors are intentionally escalating global tensions to pressure the international community. items.summary_raw: Open Source Intel MORE: The Kavomaleas is a new Greek operated tanker managed by Dynacom and flagged in Malta.  In March, the vessel loaded gasoline at Jubail for delivery to Ras Tanura, meaning it has previously transported Saudi fuel. On this voyage, it was sailing empty and heading to load cargo at one of the Gulf ports (possibly Saudi) when it was struck.  IRGC forces reportedly struck a Saudi linked (via trade) commercial vessel in the Strait of Hormuz overnight. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2079203075047276610/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

items.title: ‘My shirt was wringing’: National Express bus drivers speak out on 40C conditions
items.summary_raw:
Drivers in West Midlands say buses ‘unbearable’ during heatwaves, raising employee and passenger safety fears

Bus drivers in the West Midlands have spoken out about the “horrendous” working conditions they have experienced during heatwaves, which led to 40C temperatures in their cabs.

The UK was hit by high temperatures and dry weather in three successive heatwaves, with temperatures topping 37C last month when the country recorded its hottest ever June day. Last week, the Met Office warned climate extremes were becoming the “new ‘normal’ for the UK”.

Continue reading...

items.title: Visioner ‼️🇺🇲 Lockheed Martin has officially unveiled a game-changing addition to the global air defense arsenal, introducing the PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector (ACE)—a highly a…
items.summary_raw: Visioner ‼️🇺🇲 Lockheed Martin has officially unveiled a game-changing addition to the global air defense arsenal, introducing the PAC-3 Adapted Capability Effector (ACE)—a highly advanced, ultra-affordable Patriot interceptor specifically designed to shatter the economics of modern aerial warfare.  The revolutionary missile is engineered to complement existing Patriot frameworks while slashing production costs to less than half the price of the current $4 million PAC-3 MSE interceptor. Developed through a high-impact collaboration between U.S. and European defense industries, the PAC-3 ACE is a direct response to the grueling tactical lessons of the war in Ukraine, where the massive proliferation of cheap enemy drones and loitering munitions has demanded a far more cost-effective defensive solution. Lockheed Martin confirmed that development is moving at an aggressive pace, with full-scale production projected to hit the assembly lines within the next 36 months.  This breakthrough represents a massive strategic pivot that destroys Russia's and Iran's strategy of trying to bankrupt Western air defense systems through mass-produced drone swarms. By delivering a lethal, high-tier inte
items.summary_el: Η Lockheed Martin αποκάλυψε το PAC-3 ACE, ένα επαναστατικό ανθιαερικό πύραυλο με κόστος παραγωγής κάτω του μισού της τρέχουσας τιμής (4 εκ. δολάρια) των συστημάτων Patriot MSE.

items.title: It’s Been 52 Years Since the Fateful Day of Turkey’s ‘Attila’ Invasion of Cyprus
items.summary_raw:
NICOSIA – Memorial services, commemorative prayers, and remembrance events were held across free Cyprus on Sunday, July 19, the eve of the 52nd dark anniversary of the Turkish invasion, honoring the heroes who sacrificed their lives in 1974. The Republic of Cyprus, the National Guard, refugee organizations, and relatives of those who were killed or remain missing paid tribute to those who gave their lives defending Cyprus. They renewed their call for the fate of all missing persons to be established and for the Turkish occupation to come to an end. The commemorations will culminate on July 20, the anniversary itself, marking 52 years since the beginning of the Turkish invasion, which resulted in the continuing occupation of the northern part of Cyprus, the displacement of hundreds of thousands of refugees, and the island's division that continues to this day.

The post It’s Been 52 Years Since the Fateful Day of Turkey’s ‘Attila’ Invasion of Cyprus appeared first on The National Herald.

items.title: China Warns Japan on Nuclear Policy
items.summary_raw:
China's Foreign Ministry on Japan's nuclear policy:

Since Takaichi took office, Japanese right-wing forces have laid bare their intention to revive militarism, break free from the Three Non-Nuclear Principles, seek nuclear weapons, and continue down the wrong path.

If Japan pushes to revise the Three Non-Nuclear Principles and introduces allied nuclear weapons, it will undermine the post-war international order, violate its commitment to peace, and ultimately pay a heavy price.

items.title: Ερντογάν για τουρκική εισβολή: Δεν θα αφήσουμε ποτέ μόνους τους Τουρκοκύπριους
items.summary_raw:

Στην ανάρτησή του, ο Τούρκος πρόεδρος τόνισε πως: «τιμώ με σεβασμό τους ηρωικούς μάρτυρές μας και εκφράζω την ευγνωμοσύνη μου προς τους βετεράνους […]

Το άρθρο Ερντογάν για τουρκική εισβολή: Δεν θα αφήσουμε ποτέ μόνους τους Τουρκοκύπριους εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο Philenews.

Ο υπουργός Εξωτερικών, Γιώργος Γεραπετρίτης, είχε τηλεφωνική συνομιλία με τον υπουργό Εξωτερικών της Αιγύπτου, Μπαντρ Αμπντελάτι, σύμφωνα με σχετική ανάρτηση του υπουργείου Εξωτερικών στο X. «Οι δύο υπουργοί Εξωτερικών επιβεβαίωσαν την ισχυρή και διαρκή στρατηγική εταιρική σχέση μεταξύ της Ελλάδας και της Αιγύπτου, η οποία βασίζεται στην αμοιβαία εμπιστοσύνη, τα κοινά συμφέροντα και ένα κοινό ... Περισσότερα

www.ertnews.gr

items.title: Only one EU country misses AFIR charging target
items.summary_raw: Public charging infrastructure across the EU has grown faster than the battery-electric vehicle fleet, according to a new analysis by Transport & Environment (T&E). All member states except Malta already meet the fleet-based targets set out in the Alternative Fuels Infrastructure Regulation (AFIR), while most have also fulfilled the regulation's key motorway charging requirements.
items.summary_el: Σύμφωνα με ανάλυση του Transport & Environment, όλα τα κράτη-μέλη της ΕΕ εκτός της Μάλτας έχουν ήδη πληροί τους στόχους φόρτισης για ηλεκτρικά οχήματα που θέτει ο κανονισμός AFIR, με το δίκτυο δημόσιας υποδομής να αναπτύσσεται ταχύτερα από το στόλο των ηλεκτρικών αυτοκινήτων.
items.angle: Πόσο κοντά είναι η Ελλάδα στους στόχους του AFIR για τα σταθμό φόρτισης και τι σημαίνει αυτό για την ηλεκτροκίνηση στη χώρα;

items.title: In Search of Funding to Fight the Climate Crisis, Local Leaders Turn to Diplomacy
items.summary_raw: In Renca, Chile, the Cerros de Renca Metropolitan Park reuses industrial wastewater to address a local water crisis. Renca’s mayor, Claudio Castro, has worked for a decade to attract international investors and philanthropists to fund that system and other environmental initiatives that the region could not afford on its own. The money flows directly to […]

Όπως ανέφερε τη εταιρία, η  ανάπτυξη του PAC-3 […]

items.summary_raw:

items.title: Tesla increases profit in Germany despite lower production
items.summary_raw: Tesla concluded the 2025 fiscal year at its Grünheide plant in Germany with higher profits despite declining production and revenue. At the same time, the US electric car manufacturer is preparing a significant production ramp-up at the plant and continues to expand the site with its own battery cell manufacturing.
items.summary_el: Η Tesla αύξησε τα κέρδη στο εργοστάσιό της Grünheide της Γερμανίας παρά την πτώση της παραγωγής, προετοιμάζοντας σημαντική αύξηση και επέκταση.

items.title: Study finds EVs 18% cheaper to own in Germany
items.summary_raw: Battery-electric cars in Germany became around 18% cheaper in real terms between 2020 and 2025, according to a study by ICCT and Fraunhofer ISI. The researchers also found that the number of available EV models has more than quadrupled over the same period.
items.summary_el: Μελέτη έδειξε ότι τα ηλεκτρικά αυτοκίνητα στη Γερμανία έγιναν 18% φθηνότερα μεταξύ 2020-2025, ενώ τα διαθέσιμα μοντέλα τετραπλασιάστηκαν.

items.summary_el: Ο υπουργός Εθνικής Άμυνας Δένδιας επανέλαβε ότι το Κυπριακό θέμα αφορά παράνομη τουρκική κατοχή, υπογραμμίζοντας ότι η Λευκωσία δεν μπορεί να παραμείνει διαιρεμένη.

items.title: Δένδιας για τα 52 χρόνια από την τουρκική εισβολή στην Κύπρο: Το Κυπριακό παραμένει ζήτημα παράνομης κατοχής
items.summary_raw:
«Πενήντα δύο χρόνια από την τουρκική εισβολή στην Κύπρο, η μνήμη παραμένει ζωντανή. Τιμάμε τους πεσόντες, τους αγνοούμενους και όσους υπερασπίστηκαν την Ελευθερία της Μεγαλονήσου». Αυτό τόνισε με ανάρτηση στο κοινωνικό δίκτυο Χ ο υπουργός Εθνικής Άμυνας Νίκος Δένδιας. «Το Κυπριακό παραμένει ζήτημα παράνομης κατοχής. Η Λευκωσία δεν μπορεί να είναι σήμερα η τελευταία διαιρεμένη […]

Το άρθρο Δένδιας για τα 52 χρόνια από την τουρκική εισβολή στην Κύπρο: Το Κυπριακό παραμένει ζήτημα παράνομης κατοχής εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο ΠΤΗΣΗ.
items.summary_el: Ο υπουργός Άμυνας Νίκος Δένδιας τιμά τα 52 χρόνια από την τουρκική εισβολή της Κύπρου, επιβεβαιώνοντας ότι το Κυπριακό παραμένει ζήτημα παράνομης κατοχής και ότι η Λευκωσία δεν μπορεί να παραμείνει διαιρεμένη.

items.title: US and Iran trade strikes for ninth night as ceasefire collapses again
items.summary_raw:
For the ninth night, the US and Iran have exchanged strikes as a ceasefire collapses. The US targeted Iranian military sites while Iran retaliated with missile fire, escalating tensions.

items.title: Hitachi Energy and Eve Air Mobility partner on eVTOL charging infrastructure
items.summary_raw: Hitachi Energy and Eve Air Mobility have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to develop the electrical infrastructure required for urban air mobility. The partnership will focus on grid integration, high-power charging and energy storage solutions for vertiports, with the aim of enabling urban air mobility (UAM) at scale from 2028.
items.summary_el: Η Hitachi Energy και η Eve Air Mobility υπέγραψαν συμφωνία για ανάπτυξη ηλεκτρικής υποδομής φόρτισης αστικών αεροσκαφών (eVTOL), με στόχο την εμπορική λειτουργία από το 2028. Η συνεργασία θα εστιάσει στην ολοκλήρωση με το δίκτυο και τις λύσεις αποθήκευσης ενέργειας.

items.title: Άρχισαν τα πανηγύρια στα κατεχόμενα για τη μαύρη επέτειο της τουρκικής εισβολής – Το απόγευμα παρέλαση παρουσία Γιλμάζ
items.summary_raw:
Άρχισαν στα κατεχόμενα τα πανηγύρια για την επέτειο της τουρκικής εισβολής στην Κύπρο. Στις 6 το απόγευμα θα πραγματοποιηθεί  η στρατιωτική παρέλαση όχι στην παρουσία του Τούρκου Προέδρου Ταγίπ Ερντογάν αλλά στην παρουσία του Τούρκου Αντιπροέδρου, Τζεβντέτ Γιλμάζ.  Την ίδια ώρα θα περάσουν πάνω από το «μνημείο νίκης» στην παραλία της απόβασης στην Κερύνεια και η ομάδα […]

Το άρθρο Άρχισαν τα πανηγύρια στα κατεχόμενα για τη μαύρη επέτειο της τουρκικής εισβολής – Το απόγευμα παρέλαση παρουσία Γιλμάζ εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο Philenews.
items.summary_el: Στα κατεχόμενα ξεκίνησαν τα πανηγύρια για την επέτειο της τουρκικής εισβολής, με στρατιωτική παρέλαση στις 6 το απόγευμα παρουσία του Τούρκου Αντιπροέδρου Τζεβντέτ Γιλμάζ (όχι του Ερντογάν).

items.title: Διήμερη επίσκεψη Γ. Γεραπετρίτη στη Νότια Κορέα
items.summary_raw:
Ο υπουργός Εξωτερικών Γιώργος Γεραπετρίτης, πραγματοποιεί σήμερα και αύριο επίσκεψη στη Σεούλ. Ειδικότερα, σήμερα Δευτέρα 20 Ιουλίου, ο υπουργός Εξωτερικών θα συναντηθεί με τον υπουργό Εξωτερικών της Δημοκρατίας της Κορέας, Cho Hyun. Αύριο Τρίτη 21 Ιουλίου, ο κ. Γεραπετρίτης θα επισκεφθεί το Ελληνικό Μνημείο Πεσόντων στον Πόλεμο της Κορέας, όπου θα πραγματοποιηθεί τελετή κατάθεσης στεφάνου.

items.title: 'Sit Down': Fetterman Says Mamdani a 'Clown' to Threaten Netanyahu Arrest
items.summary_raw:
During this week's broadcast of Fox News Channel's "Sunday Morning Futures," Sen. John Fetterman (D-PA) rejected New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's threat to arrest Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

The post ‘Sit Down’: Fetterman Says Mamdani a ‘Clown’ to Threaten Netanyahu Arrest appeared first on Breitbart.
items.summary_el: Ο Γερουσιαστής Fetterman από την Πενσυλβάνια απέρριψε τις απειλές του δημάρχου της Νέας Υόρκης Mamdani για σύλληψη του πρωθυπουργού Ισραήλ Netanyahu, χαρακτηρίζοντάς τον «κλόουν».

items.title: Trump: U.S. Hit Iran ‘Very Hard’ to Honor Fallen Troops as CENTCOM Completes Ninth Consecutive Night of Strikes
items.summary_raw:
President Donald Trump said Sunday that the United States had struck Iran "very hard" in honor of three American servicemembers killed in recent days, as U.S. Central Command announced it had successfully completed a ninth consecutive evening of strikes targeting Iran's military infrastructure and its ability to attack commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

The post Trump: U.S. Hit Iran ‘Very Hard’ to Honor Fallen Troops as CENTCOM Completes Ninth Consecutive Night of Strikes appeared first on Breitbart.

items.title: Ένα που ανατίναξαν, ένα που πατούν οι ξένοι: Στερήθηκε δύο φορές το σπίτι της στον Άγιο Γεώργιο Κερύνειας – Την πρώτη φορά το 1958, τη δεύτερη το 1974
items.summary_raw:
«Σάββατο, 20 Ιουλίου, χαράματα. Αρκετοί συγχωριανοί είχαν ήδη ξυπνήσει για να πάνε να ποτίσουν τα περιβόλια τους. Οι υπόλοιποι ξυπνήσαμε λίγο αργότερα από τις κανονιές από τα πλοία. Βλέπαμε έντρομοι από τις ταράτσες των σπιτιών μας τα τουρκικά πλοία να πλησιάζουν τις ακτές μας. Αρχίσαμε να τρέχουμε, με μόνη σκέψη να βρεθούμε όσο πιο μακριά […]

Το άρθρο Ένα που ανατίναξαν, ένα που πατούν οι ξένοι: Στερήθηκε δύο φορές το σπίτι της στον Άγιο Γεώργιο Κερύνειας – Την πρώτη φορά το 1958, τη δεύτερη το 1974 εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο Philenews.
items.summary_el: Μια κυπριακή γυναίκα από τον Άγιο Γεώργιο Κερύνειας χάνει το σπίτι της δύο φορές: την πρώτη το 1958 κατά τη βρετανική αποεπίستρατηση και τη δεύτερη το 1974 κατά την τουρκική εισβολή.

items.title: World Council of Cretans President Met with the President of Cyprus in Nicosia
items.summary_raw:
NICOSIA – World Council of Cretans (WCC) President Nickos Kastrinakis visited Cyprus to participate in the commemorative events marking the grim anniversary of the Turkish invasion of July 20, 1974, paying tribute to the heroes and victims of the Cypriot tragedy. During his visit, the WCC President had the honor of meeting at the Presidential Palace with President of the Republic of Cyprus Nikos Christodoulides. Kastrinakis conveyed the unwavering support and solidarity of Cretans throughout the world to the people of Cyprus. The meeting highlighted the enduring bonds between Crete and Cyprus, as well as the shared historical journey of the two islands through struggles for freedom, democracy, and national dignity. As part of his visit, Kastrinakis laid a wreath at the Tomb of Makedonitissa, one of the most symbolic memorial sites of the Republic of Cyprus, honoring those who gave their lives in the struggle for the freedom of Cyprus.

The post World Council of Cretans President Met with the President of Cyprus in Nicosia appeared first on

items.title: Kuwait says Iranian attacks damaged vital facilities
items.summary_raw:
Kuwait says Iranian attacks damaged vital facilities

Kuwait’s defence ministry says Iran “continues to target civilian and vital facilities in the country”, and has caused fires and “severe damage” to facilities by its attacks.

Spokesperson Major General Saud Abdulaziz Al-Otaibi said that “reprehensible Iranian aggression” has struck facilities affiliated with the “Ministry of Electricity, Water, and Renewable Energy."

items.title: Iran accuses US of violating international law after strike on nuclear plant
items.summary_raw:
Iran accuses US of violating international law after strike on nuclear plant

Iran’s nuclear energy watchdog condemned the United States for bombing the construction site of the Darkhovin Nuclear Power Plant.

In a statement, the Atomic Energy Organisation of Iran (AEOI) said the US had targeted a symbol of the Iranian nation’s dignity and its efforts to achieve self-reliance.

“The terrorist and criminal US regime, whose nature is nothing but bullying and lawlessness, carried out an aggressive and barbaric act in violation of international law,” the organisation said in a statement.

items.title: Γιγάντια πυρκαγιά μαίνεται βόρεια της Μαδρίτης και έκανε στάχτη 120.000 στρέμματα
items.summary_raw:
Πυρκαγιά που ξέσπασε την Πέμπτη περίπου 100 χιλιόμετρα βόρεια της Μαδρίτης επεκτάθηκε, μετατρέποντας σε στάχτη περισσότερα από 120.000 στρέμματα και προκαλώντας την απομάκρυνση εκατοντάδων ανθρώπων από τις εστίες τους, ανακοίνωσαν σήμερα οι τοπικές αρχές. Η δασική πυρκαγιά, που μαίνεται στην περιοχή της Γουαδαλαχάρα και κυρίως στο φυσικό πάρκο Σιέρα Νόρτε, δεν έχει προκαλέσει μέχρι στιγμής […]

Το άρθρο Γιγάντια πυρκαγιά μαίνεται βόρεια της Μαδρίτης και έκανε στάχτη 120.000 στρέμματα εμφανίστηκε πρώτα στο ΠΤΗΣΗ.
items.summary_el: Γιγάντια δασική πυρκαγιά βόρεια της Μαδρίτης κατέστρεψε 120.000 στρέμματα στη Γουαδαλαχάρα και το φυσικό πάρκο Σιέρα Νόρτε, προκαλώντας απομάκρυνση εκατοντάδων κατοίκων. Το πύρινο μέτωπο ξέσπασε Πέμπτη και συνεχίζει να απειλεί περιοχές της Ισπανίας.

items.summary_raw: ⚡️ MP Ihab Hamadeh from Sahmar: The project to abolish the resistance has fallen and will not be realized  In a speech, MP Ihab Hamadeh, a member of the Loyalty to the Resistance bloc, affirmed that the goals raised during the Israeli wars and aggressions were "zero-sum goals" based on eliminating the other party and ending its existence, pointing out that the project aimed to destroy the South, displace its people, and eliminate the environment that supports the resistance, thereby ensuring the security and future of the Israeli entity. However, these goals, according to him, fell due to the steadfastness of the resistance and the resilience of its people.  MP Ihab Hamadeh considered that the Israeli-American project is still ongoing with different political tools, but it will not achieve what it failed to impose by war, stressing that the option of resistance remains and that attempts to undermine its presence and influence have gone irrevocably.  The member of the Loyalty to the Resistance bloc touched upon regional developments, considering that one of the most prominent goals of the confrontation was to target the Islamic Republic of Iran and seek to change its regime in a way

items.title: Νέα αφιξη μεταναστών στα νότια της Κρήτης – Εντοπίστηκε λέμβος με περίπου 60 άτομα
items.summary_raw:
Νέα λέμβος με αλλοδαπούς εντοπίστηκε τις μεσημβρινές ώρες της Κυριακής (19/07) στα νότια της Κρήτης. Το πλοιάριο με τους περίπου 60 αλλαδαπούς εντόπισε εναέριο μέσο της FRONTEX και σκάφος του Λιμενικού Σώματος, στη θαλάσσια περιοχή 46 ναυτικά μίλια νότια νοτιοανατολικά της Ιεράπετρας Λασιθίου. Οι αλλοδαποί μεταφέρονται αυτή την ώρα στο λιμάνι της Ιεράπετρας.

items.title: Iran nuclear agency condemns US strike on Darkhovin nuclear power plant site: Mehr
items.summary_raw:
Iran nuclear agency condemns US strike on Darkhovin nuclear power plant site: Mehr

The Atomic Energy Organization of Iran condemned a U.S. attack on the site of the nuclear power plant under contruction in Darkhovin, saying the strike violated international law, Mehr news agency reported on Sunday without saying when the strike occurred.

Construction of the plant in southwestern Iran's Khuzestan province began in 2022.

items.title: ⚡️ Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: Despite the damage to Iranian nuclear facilities during the 12-day war, and their practical entry into a state of forced shutdown, the I…
items.summary_raw: ⚡️ Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi: Despite the damage to Iranian nuclear facilities during the 12-day war, and their practical entry into a state of forced shutdown, the Iranian delegation's mission was to reject the opposing party's demand to accept the suspension of uranium enrichment. It cannot be definitively stated that if we had accepted the suspension, the war would not have broken out, but it is certain that if we had agreed to it, the losses would have been more severe than the war itself, because we would have compromised the country's dignity. The decision to stop the 12-day war was a correct decision, because it prepared the conditions for Iran's victory in the 40-day war later. Some opinions believe that continuing the fighting in the first war would have prevented the outbreak of the second war, but the opposing party held the same perception. The first war contributed to raising the level of Iranian military readiness in preparation for any subsequent confrontation. The decision to end the war is taken collectively within the Supreme National Security Council, and is implemented according to the approved constitutional mechanisms. The Iranian missile launch

items.title: Majority of US voters link extreme weather to climate crisis, study finds
items.summary_raw:
Top Democrat says findings show public ‘way ahead of the politicians’ as Trump dismisses global heating as ‘hoax’

Amid a summer of dangerous heat, drought and floods, a majority of Americans are connecting increasingly severe weather to the climate crisis, new polling shows, despite efforts by Donald Trump to dismiss global heating as a “con job” and a “hoax”.

It’s a sign that attempts to suppress and polarize climate concerns may not be seeing full success, said Grace Adcox, senior climate strategist at Data for Progress.

In the deserts of the United Arab Emirates a sprawling clean energy project, stretching across an area roughly the size of 12,600 football fields, will play host to a breakthrough allowing solar energy to power the equivalent of half a million homes through the night.

The Gulf state has been steadily combining 5.2GW of solar power capacity with 19GWh of battery storage to create the largest battery scheme in the world.

Continue reading...

The statement from the Atomic Energy Organization of Iran, condemning the terrorist attack by the United States government on the construction site of the Darkhovin nuclear power plant, read as follows: The terrorist and crime-involved United States government, whose nature is nothing but tyranny and lawlessness, in an aggressive and barbaric act contrary to international laws, on Sunday, July 28, at approximately 3:39 AM local time, launched an attack on the construction site of the Darkhovin nuclear power plant – one of the symbols of Iran's scientific determination and self-sufficiency – using a number of missiles.

items.title: Trump says he ‘couldn’t care less’ about Iran leaving nuclear agreement
items.summary_raw:
Trump says he ‘couldn’t care less’ about Iran leaving nuclear agreement

US President Donald Trump said he “couldn’t care less” after Iran announced it would no longer abide by the US-Iran memorandum of understanding (MoU) signed last month.

Speaking in a brief phone interview with US cable network NewsNation, Trump reiterated that the US’s main objective remains “never allowing Iran to have a nuclear weapon”.

Washington and Tehran signed the MoU in mid-June in an effort to end the war launched by the US and Israel in February.

items.title: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇲🇮🇷 BIG | The United States is locked and loaded for a massive regional war—shifting a staggering amount of aerial firepower directly into the Middle East as the shad…
items.summary_raw: Visioner ‼️‼️🇺🇲🇮🇷 BIG | The United States is locked and loaded for a massive regional war—shifting a staggering amount of aerial firepower directly into the Middle East as the shadow war with Iran reaches a boiling point.  In an unprecedented deployment confirmed by defense officials, the U.S. military is positioning roughly 100 aerial refueling tankers inside Israel, with dozens already touching down.  Simultaneously, a formidable armada of F-35 stealth fighters from the UK and F-15s from Germany is being rushed to the theater. Crucially, this strike package includes specialized electronic warfare jets engineered to suppress enemy air defenses and permanently blind Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) radar networks.  This is not a defensive posture; it is a textbook blueprint for a multi-nation, deep-strike offensive. By flooding the theater with unprecedented refueling capacity and specialized radar-hunting jets, Washington is effectively building the logistics spine for long-range, sustained bombing campaigns, sending a chilling message to Tehran that its entire air defense architecture can be erased at a moment's notice.  See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo
items.summary_el: Οι ΗΠΑ αναπτύσσουν περίπου 100 αεροσκάφη ανεφοδιασμού στο Ισραήλ και φέρνουν F-35 και F-15 μαχητικά, ενώ η σκιώδης σύγκρουση με το Ιράν φθάνει σε κρίσιμο σημείο.

items.title: Casus belli: Μύθοι και πραγματικότητα
items.summary_raw:
Η Μαρία Γαβουνέλη, καθηγήτρια διεθνούς δικαίου στη Νομική Σχολή του ΕΚΠΑ, γράφει στο in για το casus belli, ότι «δεν είναι – και δεν μπορεί να είναι – τίποτα άλλο από μια σαφή απειλή χρήσης βίας, εάν η Ελλάδα αποφασίσει την επέκταση των χωρικών της υδάτων πέραν των έξι μιλίων».

The post Casus belli: Μύθοι και πραγματικότητα appeared first on in.gr.

items.title: Bank of England to stop accepting bonds linked to coal for key loans
items.summary_raw:
Campaigners hope move will force commercial banks to rethink holding assets linked to the fossil fuel

Climate campaigners have declared a victory after the Bank of England said it would no longer accept bonds linked to one of the most polluting industries on the planet for key loan arrangements.

The ban, which comes into force in October, marks a fresh crackdown on thermal coal, which is burned in power plants to create electricity, and has long been a target of green policy activists.

Continue reading...

items.summary_raw: Former Greek PM Alexis Tsipras:  We talk about a "strong Greece." But what does a strong Greece really mean?   Does it mean spending billions so that we have Rafale fighter jets, or does it also mean investing in strong communities on the islands that face Türkiye?  What will actually protect us if there are no people left living on those islands?  If those islands are abandoned, do we really think we can defend them only with powerful weapons and military equipment?

items.title: ⚡️ The Trump administration drafted a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia that would allow the kingdom to enrich uranium for its civilian nuclear program. The deal was …
items.summary_raw: ⚡️ The Trump administration drafted a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia that would allow the kingdom to enrich uranium for its civilian nuclear program. The deal was finalized but has not yet been signed by President Trump or sent to Congress. The proposal is controversial because it does not require Saudi Arabia to adopt the strongest IAEA inspection regime (the Additional Protocol), but instead relies on a separate US-Saudi safeguards agreement. Critics warn that this could make it easier for Saudi Arabia to develop nuclear weapons capabilities in the future. Source: CNN

items.title: The Trump administration has drafted a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia that would allow the kingdom to enrich uranium for its civilian nuclear program.   The deal i…
items.summary_raw: The Trump administration has drafted a nuclear cooperation agreement with Saudi Arabia that would allow the kingdom to enrich uranium for its civilian nuclear program.   The deal is complete but has not yet been signed by President Trump or sent to Congress.  The proposal is controversial because it would not require Saudi Arabia to adopt the International Atomic Energy Agency's strongest inspection regime (the Additional Protocol), relying instead on a separate U.S.-Saudi safeguards agreement.   Critics warn this could make it easier for Saudi Arabia to develop nuclear weapons capability in the future.  Source: CNN

items.title: Open Source Intel UPDATE: UKMTO has re-classified an incident 65NM south of Al Mukalla, Yemen, as a Hijack. Military authorities report the vessel was boarded by unauthorised perso…
items.summary_raw: Open Source Intel UPDATE: UKMTO has re-classified an incident 65NM south of Al Mukalla, Yemen, as a Hijack. Military authorities report the vessel was boarded by unauthorised personnel while transiting east through the Gulf of Aden, and has since been manoeuvred into Somalian territorial waters.  Vessels advised to transit with caution.  BREAKING: ATTACK: HOUTHIS   The UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) says it received a report of an illegal boarding involving a vessel about 65 nautical miles south of Al Mukalla, Yemen, in the Gulf of Aden.  According to military authorities, unauthorized personnel boarded the vessel while it was transiting eastbound. The incident is under investigation.  UKMTO is advising ships in the area to exercise caution and report any suspicious activity. - Open Source Intel tweet

items.title: Rector of Türkiye’s National Defense University, Erhan Afyoncu:  In my view, the events of July 15 were not simply a coup attempt by a group capable of taking over the government. …
items.summary_raw: Rector of Türkiye’s National Defense University, Erhan Afyoncu:  In my view, the events of July 15 were not simply a coup attempt by a group capable of taking over the government. Rather, they would have dragged Türkiye into a civil war.   The true heroes were the people, who took to the streets. They were joined by patriotic members of the police and the armed forces who resisted the plot.   The events of July 15 resulted in the deaths of 253 people, who are regarded as martyrs, and 1,737 people being wounded and recognized as veterans.   It marked the country's escape from what could have been a far greater catastrophe.

items.summary_raw: Rector of Türkiye’s National Defense University, Erhan Afyoncu:  Europe is no longer "the West" — it has become a cultural zone. It has lost its warfighting capacity, its industrial dynamism, and its population is shrinking.  In Norway, 70% of preschool children are not Norwegian by origin. Europe filled its population gap with migrants — but  they couldn't assimilate them.  Rising racism now brings conflict, but they need those migrants.

items.title: Nuno Felix RT @MoloWarMonitor: In recent hours, we have been witnessing a significant shift in the strategy behind Iranian missile attacks.  Over the past few days, the primary tar…
items.summary_raw: Nuno Felix RT @MoloWarMonitor: In recent hours, we have been witnessing a significant shift in the strategy behind Iranian missile attacks.  Over the past few days, the primary target in the Middle East has been the Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, a facility crucial to Israel's defense.  Indeed, at the start of the war, the majority of Iranian missiles fired at Israel were intercepted over Jordan, which serves as Israel's most critical air defensive layer.  If Iranian attacks continue at this pace, the U.S. will sooner or later exhaust its stocks of Patriot missiles, supplies that have already been significantly depleted in recent months, leaving Israel far more vulnerable should it become directly involved in the war.  ⭕️ Reports of another attack on Muwaffaq Salti Air Base confirmed, several Patriot PAC-3 interceptor ($5.3 million) fired.  This is the third time it's been attacked in the past 12 hours. https://twitter.com/MenchOsint/status/2078434051090723075/video/1 - MenchOsint tweet

items.title: French President Macron offered Germany co-production on the SAMP/T NG air defense system as a European alternative to the US Patriot.  SAMP/T NG is currently Europe's only air def…
items.summary_raw: French President Macron offered Germany co-production on the SAMP/T NG air defense system as a European alternative to the US Patriot.  SAMP/T NG is currently Europe's only air defense system capable of intercepting ballistic missiles, using the new Aster 30 B1 NT missile.  Germany currently relies on US Patriot with PAC-3 MSE — but delivery times are long, production is only in the US and Japan, leaving Berlin dependent on Washington.  Also on the table: France, Germany, and the UK will explore deep precision strike cooperation, including a 2,500 km-range ballistic missile from ArianeGroup.  Source: hartpunkt
items.summary_el: Ο Μακρόν προσφέρει στη Γερμανία συν-παραγωγή του ευρωπαϊκού συστήματος SAMP/T NG, ικανού να αναχαιτίζει βαλλιστικούς πυραύλους, ως ευρωπαϊκή εναλλακτική στο αμερικανικό Patriot. Η Γερμανία προς το παρόν είναι εξαρτημένη από αμερικανικές προμήθειες με μεγάλες καθυστερήσεις.
items.angle: Ευρωπαϊκή αυτάρκεια στην άμυνα: Η πρόταση Μακρόν για εναλλακτική του Patriot χωρίς αμερικανική εξάρτηση

items.title: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü:  When we found ourselves in 2016–2017, especially after the failed coup attempt in Türkiye, some of our allies decided to redeploy their Patriot …
items.summary_raw: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü:  When we found ourselves in 2016–2017, especially after the failed coup attempt in Türkiye, some of our allies decided to redeploy their Patriot systems that were deployed in Türkiye.   We found ourselves in 2016–2017 with a very urgent need to fill an immediate gap in our air defense architecture.   That's why we were compelled to buy this S-400 as an immediate gap filler.  But in no way did that mean that our quest for an air defense system stopped there. As I mentioned, this is a one-off procurement. This is an immediate gap filler.   Our commitment is, and will continue to be, to procure the air defense system that will be interoperable with the rest of the Alliance.
items.summary_el: Ο τουρκικός Αναπληρωτής ΥΠΕΞ εξήγησε ότι μετά την απόπειρα πραξικοπήματος 2016-2017, συμμαχικές δυνάμεις απέσυραν τα συστήματα Patriot, δημιουργώντας επείγον κενό αμύνης. Το S-400 ήταν προσωρινή λύση για ένα άμεσο κενό και όχι μόνιμη επιλογή.
items.angle: Η απόπειρα πραξικοπήματος που αναγκάστηκε την Τουρκία στο S-400: η ρωσική εναλλακτική ως περιστασιακή λύση

items.title: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü:  When you remember how we ended up by buying the S-400, I'm going to put it into context there as well.   The whole process of us acquiring an ai…
items.summary_raw: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü:  When you remember how we ended up by buying the S-400, I'm going to put it into context there as well.   The whole process of us acquiring an air defense system started in 2010. We opened many tenders—I think three or four tenders were opened in the first seven years or so—and every time the U.S. offer turned out to be the most expensive.  That's understandable because Patriot systems are the best on the market right now. But they also turned out to be the least cooperative in terms of offsets, possibilities for technology sharing, or co-production of any of the components.   More importantly, they turned out to be the least reliable as well, because every time we discussed with our U.S. colleagues whether they could guarantee the delivery of these urgently needed air defense systems, they said they were a democratic country with congressional oversight and there was no way they could guarantee delivery within a certain period of time.   They also said that Türkiye's image in Congress was not good and that we had to work not only with the administration but with Congress as well.
items.summary_el: Ο τουρκικός Αναπληρωτής ΥΠΕΞ αναφέρει ότι η απόκτηση του S-400 προήλθε από αμερικανικές προσφορές για συστήματα Patriot που ήταν ακριβότερα και λιγότερο προθυμοποιημένα για τεχνολογική μεταφορά και συν-παραγωγή. Η διαδικασία αναζήτησης αντιαεροπορικής άμυνας ξεκίνησε το 2010 με πολλές δημοπρασίες.
items.angle: Γιατί η Τουρκία επέλεξε το S-400: Η αποτυχία των ΗΠΑ να προσφέρουν ευνοϊκούς όρους τεχνολογίας

items.title: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü on Türkiye's F-35 jets:  This time we really feel closer. We feel that we might be able to resolve this issue and leave that problem behind oursel…
items.summary_raw: Turkish Deputy FM Levent Gümrükçü on Türkiye's F-35 jets:  This time we really feel closer. We feel that we might be able to resolve this issue and leave that problem behind ourselves.  I would say, because for the first time ever, really for the last 10 to 15 years, we have full confidence in the United States administration that when we reach a deal, they're going to deliver their part of the deal as well.  And it's not only about selling F-35s or returning Türkiye to the F-35 program, as we used to be a part of.   Of course, it is about forging a much deeper defense industry cooperation between the United States and Türkiye, taking into account our comparative advantages, taking into account the importance of this issue.  So that is what makes us more hopeful than anything else.
items.summary_el: Ο Αναπληρωτής ΥΠΕΞ της Τουρκίας Λεβέντ Γιουμρουκτσού δήλωσε ότι υπάρχει νέα ελπίδα επίλυσης του ζητήματος των F-35, επικαλούμενος πρώτη φορά πλήρη εμπιστοσύνη στην αμερικανική διοίκηση. Το ζήτημα αφορά όχι μόνο την επιστροφή της Τουρκίας στο πρόγραμμα F-35 αλλά και την εις βάθος στρατιωτική συνεργασία.
